title: Bedtime Stories: Tales of Love and Hate
original_title: Bedtime Stories: Tales of Love and Hate
overview: Three tales of the line between love and hate, based on short stories by renowned writers: a determined man swears off women, a cunning wife plots to win back her cheating spouse, and a scorned individual succumbs to frightful revenge.
